allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./src/data/databaze.json'\); const slovni = db.filter\(e => e.tema === 'slovni_ulohy'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(slovni.slice\(0,5\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const raw = require\('./src/data/databaze.json'\); const db = raw.examples; const slovni = db.filter\(e => e.tema === 'slovni_ulohy'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(slovni.slice\(0,8\), null, 2\)\)")

PowerShell($msg = "Homepage refresh: guest landing + logged-in dashboard`n`nGuest: hero CTA -> /vitej + /cermat-test, sekce Co te ceka, rodic CTA`nLogged-in: skutecny nazev/XP denni vyzvy, nova karta CERMAT test`nBottomNav: 4 polozky \(bez Test\)`n`nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem .next/static/chunks -Recurse -File | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { "{0,8} kB  {1}" -f [math]::Round\($_.Length/1024,1\), $_.Name })

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**p.get\('dependencies',{}\),**p.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\) if 'supabase' in k or 'next' in k]")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/certificate?name=Tomas+Novak&readiness=82&xp=1250&streak=15" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\), Size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 18; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/certificate?name=Tomas+Novak&readiness=82&xp=1250&streak=15" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\), Size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/certificate?name=Tomas&readiness=82&xp=1250&streak=15" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\), Content-Type: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\), Size: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\) | Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })
